reviews.comment:
Baños nuevos muy limpios Fuimos a comer a la parrilla de atras y no todo lo q trajeron estaba bueno La tira y el vacio estaban crudos y la bondiola y el lomo muy buenos

(Translated by Google)
New, very clean bathrooms. We went to eat at the grill in the back and not everything they brought was good. The strip and the flank were raw and the pork shoulder and loin were very good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdjlEOGR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Todo muy lindo pero son muy lerdos para atender.

(Translated by Google)
Everything is very nice, but they are very slow to serve you.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBMmZtRTlBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Mucho espacio verde ideal para parar con o familia y hacer un stop en el viaje a recuperar energías. Incluso con mascotas. Baños en condiciones y variedad en alimentos y bebidas. 👍

(Translated by Google)
Plenty of green space, ideal for stopping with family and taking a break to recharge. Pets are welcome too. Clean restrooms and a variety of food and drinks. 👍
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3LWM2UldBEAE

reviews.comment:
Un buen lugar para parar despues de un largo viaje.

(Translated by Google)
A good place to stop after a long trip.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURBcU92Ny1nRRAB

reviews.comment:
La parrilla esta bien. Atienden amable y podes pagar con tarjeta. El servicio de mesa es básico. Los precios son un poco caros para mi gusto: 2 sanguches de lomo + 2 sodas + servicio de mesa = $360. Es una buena parada si estas con chicos ya que tiene una plaza. Baños muy limpios.

(Translated by Google)
The grill is good. The service is friendly and you can pay by card. The table service is basic. The prices are a bit high for my taste: 2 steak sandwiches + 2 sodas + table service = $360. It's a good place to stop if you're with kids since it has a playground. The restrooms are very clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnekxmQnFnRRAB
